fields.name: openToWork
fields.label: Open to Work
fields.instruction: Turn on to show a badge that you are available for hire

fields.name: openToWork
fields.label: Open to Work
fields.instruction: Turn on to show a badge that you are available for hire

sections.label: Hero Section
sections.instruction: This is the first thing visitors see — introduce yourself clearly

fields.name: focus
fields.label: Focus Areas
fields.instruction: Technologies or areas you specialize in

fields.name: tagline
fields.label: One Line Tagline
fields.instruction: A short sentence that describes what you do
fields.placeholder: I build fast, clean and scalable web apps

fields.name: description
fields.label: About You
fields.instruction: 2 to 3 sentences about yourself and who you help
fields.placeholder: I am a full stack developer with 2 years of experience building web applications for startups and freelance clients...

sections.label: Projects
sections.instruction: Add your best projects. Minimum 2, maximum 6.

fields.name: description
fields.label: What does it do?
fields.placeholder: A web app that lets users create beautiful portfolios by filling a simple form...

fields.name: stack
fields.label: Tech Stack
fields.instruction: Type a technology and press Enter to add it

fields.name: githubLink
fields.label: GitHub Repository URL
fields.instruction: Visitors will see a View Code button linking here

fields.name: liveLink
fields.label: Live / Deployed URL
fields.instruction: Visitors will see a Live Demo button linking here

sections.label: Skills
sections.instruction: Group your skills into categories — e.g. Frontend, Backend, Tools

fields.name: items
fields.label: Skills
fields.instruction: Type a skill and press Enter to add it

sections.label: Contact
sections.instruction: How can people reach you? Navbar #contact link will scroll here.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email Address
fields.instruction: Visitors can email you directly by clicking the contact button
